why_it_matters_for_step2: National construction may reveal new join failures.

step1_finding: PY2021 QHP Landscape direct URLs may be unavailable.
why_it_matters_for_step2: 2021->2022 treatment requires prior-year top-two silver premiums.
action_in_step2: Attempt 2021 panel from official Exchange PUF plus Health Plan Finder rating-area fallback; flag if incomplete.

step1_finding: OEP outcomes are county-year aggregate only.
why_it_matters_for_step2: No individual-level or enrollee-level retention analysis is possible.

step1_finding: Individual-level HTE is impossible with these PUFs.
why_it_matters_for_step2: Later HTE/policy work cannot use individual heterogeneity.
action_in_step2: Document county-level HTE only as possible later design.

step1_finding: Household-specific post-subsidy premiums are not directly public.
why_it_matters_for_step2: Exact zero-premium status depends on household income/composition.
action_in_step2: Use benchmark-based low-income proxy and label it as proxy.

step1_finding: Alaska and Hawaii need exclusion or special handling.
Nebraska may need exclusion or special handling.

step1_finding: Suppression/missingness exists in OEP county outcomes.
action_in_step2: Preserve rows, set derived values missing, and flag suppression.

step1_finding: Returning consumers are represented through Tot_Renrl in tested OEP files.
